title: Problem with policy.json
body:
# Problem

I run with this cmd `sudo ./buildah bud -f Dockerfile`, got this:
```
STEP 1: FROM busybox
ERRO[0000] error building: error creating build container: error pulling image "docker.io/library/busybox:latest": error obtaining default signature policy: open /etc/containers/policy.json: no such file or directory 
```

I read `docs/buildah-bud.md`, find this:
```
**--signature-policy** *signaturepolicy*
Pathname of a signature policy file to use.  It is not recommended that this
option be used, as the default behavior of using the system-wide default policy
(frequently */etc/containers/policy.json*) is most often preferred.
```

But I still have no idea what the policy json should be.

# About My test enviroment

```
Linux version 4.4.0-96-generic (buildd@lgw01-10) (gcc version 5.4.0 20160609 (Ubuntu 5.4.0-6ubuntu1~16.04.4) ) #119-Ubuntu SMP Tue Sep 12 14:59:54 UTC 2017
```

I build buildah from source code, use `make buildah`
